name: @borjie/litfin-port-data-infra
description: LITFIN-ported data + infra primitives: tenant-guard (AsyncLocalStorage context + Redis/S3 prefixing + Pino log scrubber + audit-chain continuity), append-only event store (in-memory + Postgres) with optimistic concurrency, mining-domain event types (loan -> mining-shift / production / payout / royalty), error codes, community-kernel namespace shells. Verbatim port discipline, brand swapped LitFin -> Borjie. Layered alongside native @borjie/tenant-isolation-guard / @borjie/workflow-engine / payments-ledger service; does NOT replace them.
